title: LLM agent action output schema v0.2
description: Structured action candidate from LLM (ActionProposal): action_type, args, rationale, confidence, audit fields. Used for constrained decoding and safety shield input. Must match allowed_actions.

action_type.description: Engine action type. Must be one of ALLOWED_ACTIONS or NOOP. Canonical set: NOOP, TICK, MOVE, QUEUE_RUN, START_RUN, OPEN_DOOR, RELEASE_RESULT, RELEASE_RESULT_OVERRIDE, CREATE_ACCESSION, ACCEPT_SPECIMEN, REJECT_SPECIMEN, HOLD_SPECIMEN, DISPATCH_TRANSPORT, TRANSPORT_TICK, CHAIN_OF_CUSTODY_SIGN, RECEIVE_TRANSPORT, ACK_CRITICAL_RESULT, GENERATE_RESULT, END_RUN, MINT_TOKEN, REVOKE_TOKEN, CONSUME_TOKEN, and others from policy.

args.description: Action arguments: device_id, work_id, from_zone, to_zone, result_id, specimen_id, door_id, token_refs, priority_class (ROUTINE|STAT|URGENT), attempt_id, etc.

token_refs.description: Token references (e.g. for OPEN_DOOR restricted doors)

reason_code.description: Reason code when action may be blocked or NOOP chosen

rationale.description: Short operational rationale; cite policy/RBAC/constraint. For audit.

explanation_short.description: Brief explanation; max 280 characters for auditability
